name: skill-builder
description: A skill that opens a local visual editor for creating, editing, testing, and exporting stateful automation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Run a skill that edits stateful automation skills visually.
interface.longDescription: Skill Builder is not a standalone platform or separately hosted app. It is a skill that contains a bundled local editor. After plugin installation, the agent harness reads the skill, launches that bundled editor, and can also apply natural-language edit requests directly to the skill filesystem. It supports importing existing skills, editing steps and helpers, live filesystem sync, and exporting Claude Code or Codex compatible skill packages.
defaultPrompt: Run Skill Builder for this skill package.
Create a new stateful skill workflow with Skill Builder.
Import this skill into Skill Builder and inspect its workflow.
